research_sources.title: Efficient Streaming Language Models with Attention Sinks
research_sources.claim: Initial sink tokens can stabilize streaming/windowed attention.

research_sources.title: Why do LLMs attend to the first token?
research_sources.claim: Attention sinks can help prevent over-mixing and preserve information flow.

research_sources.title: Attention Sinks Are Functionally Essential in Softmax Transformers: Theoretical Evidence
research_sources.claim: Softmax normalization can force stable sink-like behavior for default routing.

research_sources.title: On the Existence and Behavior of Secondary Attention Sinks
research_sources.claim: Middle-layer activation dynamics can create secondary sinks beyond BOS.
